_comment: NPC: Guard Captain Lin (林队长). INFERRED — Great Wang Capital inhabitant. Canon ID: INF-GWC-02. Per Article II (Reality First): the Zhao Country capital must have inhabitants. These NPCs are inferred from the city's district structure (governor mansion, temple, market, tavern, port). Prime Directive: these beings exist independently of the player's perception.
name: Guard Captain Lin
personality: alert, suspicious, dutiful; takes security seriously
relationship_to_wanglin: INFERRED — neutral; would treat Wang Lin as another traveler unless provoked

perception_tiers.mortal: A guard captain of the capital
perception_tiers.foundation: Guard Captain Lin — Qi Condensation 9 (peak). INFERRED capital resident.
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Guard Captain Lin — minor figure in the capital's power structure

note: INFERRED from Great Wang Capital district structure. alert, suspicious, dutiful; takes security seriously

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi.

initiation_lines: Halt. The Great Wang Capital does not admit armed strangers without inspection. State your name and purpose.
The smuggler tunnels beneath the city are a persistent problem. My guards find new entrances every month. If you see anything suspicious, report it immediately.
The capital has not seen open conflict in years. But that is because the Teng family's reputation keeps the ambitious in check. Do not test that peace.
My guards patrol from the city gate to the port docks. If you are caught stealing from the warehouse district, I will personally escort you to the governor's dungeon.

sect_tasks.description: Guard Captain Lin barks: 'My men need supplies. Iron for weapons, arrows for the watchtowers. The capital's safety is not free — bring me materials and I will pay from the guard treasury.'

Guard Captain Lin scowls: 'The smugglers are getting bolder. If you can gather information — glass bottles for evidence collection, string for binding suspects — I will reward you. The governor wants those tunnels sealed.'
